pve_actions.name: Bootshine
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 220.
Opo-opo's Fury Potency: 420
Opo-opo Form Bonus: Guarantees a critical hit
Damage dealt is increased when under an effect that raises critical hit rate.
Additional Effect: Changes form to raptor
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: True Strike
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 300.
Raptor's Fury Potency: 500
Can only be executed when in raptor form.
Additional Effect: Changes form to coeurl
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Snap Punch
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 270.
330 when executed from a target's flank.
Coeurl's Fury Potency: 420
Flank Coeurl's Fury Potency: 480
Can only be executed when in coeurl form.
Additional Effect: Changes form to opo-opo
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Steeled Meditation
pve_actions.effect:
Opens a chakra. Up to five chakra can be opened at once.
Opens all five chakra when used outside of combat.
Triggers the cooldown of weaponskills upon execution.
Conversely, execution of weaponskills triggers the cooldown of this action.
Can only be executed while less than five chakra are open.

pve_actions.name: Steel Peak
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 180.
Can only be executed while in combat and under the effect of five Chakra. Five chakra close upon execution.

pve_actions.name: Twin Snakes
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 420.
Can only be executed when in raptor form.
Additional Effect: Grants a stack of Raptor's Fury
Raptor's Fury Effect: Increases potency of Rising Raptor by 200
Additional Effect: Changes form to coeurl
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Arm of the Destroyer
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 110 to all nearby targets.
Opo-opo Form Potency: 120
Additional Effect: Changes form to raptor
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Demolish
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 360.
420 when executed from a target's rear.
Can only be executed when in coeurl form.
Additional Effect: Grants 2 stacks of Coeurl's Fury
Coeurl's Fury Effect: Increases potency of Pouncing Coeurl by 150
Additional Effect: Changes form to opo-opo
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Rockbreaker
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 150 to all nearby enemies.
Can only be executed when in coeurl form.
Additional Effect: Changes form to opo-opo
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Thunderclap
pve_actions.effect:
Rush to a targeted enemy's or party member's location.
Maximum Charges: 3
Cannot be executed while bound.

pve_actions.name: Inspirited Meditation
pve_actions.effect:
Opens a chakra. Up to five chakra can be opened at once.
Opens all five chakra when used outside of combat.
Triggers the cooldown of weaponskills upon execution.
Conversely, execution of weaponskills triggers the cooldown of this action.
Can only be executed while less than five chakra are open.

pve_actions.name: Howling Fist
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100 to all enemies in a straight line before you.
Can only be executed while in combat and under the effect of five Chakra. Five chakra close upon execution.

pve_actions.name: Mantra
pve_actions.effect:
Increases HP recovery via healing actions by 10% for self and nearby party members.
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Four-point Fury
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 140 to all nearby enemies.
Can only be executed when in raptor form.
Additional Effect: Changes form to coeurl
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Dragon Kick
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 320.
Opo-opo Form Bonus: Grants a stack of Opo-opo's Fury
Opo-opo's Fury Effect: Increases potency of Leaping Opo by 200
Additional Effect: Changes form to raptor
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Perfect Balance
pve_actions.effect:
Grants 3 stacks of Perfect Balance, each stack allowing the execution of a weaponskill that requires a certain form, without being in that form.
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Grants Opo-opo Chakra, Coeurl Chakra, or Raptor Chakra depending on the form changed to upon executing actions
Changing to Opo-opo Form grants Coeurl Chakra.
Changing to Raptor Form grants Opo-opo Chakra.
Changing to Coeurl Form grants Raptor Chakra.
Maximum Charges: 2
Can only be executed while in combat and when not under the effect of any Beast Chakra.

pve_actions.name: Form Shift
pve_actions.effect:
Grants Formless Fist to self, allowing the execution of a weaponskill that requires a certain form, without being in that form.
Duration: 30s
Any additional effects associated with the executed action will also be applied.

pve_actions.name: Forbidden Meditation
pve_actions.effect:
Opens a chakra. Up to five chakra can be opened at once.
Opens all five chakra when used outside of combat.
Triggers the cooldown of weaponskills upon execution.
Conversely, execution of weaponskills triggers the cooldown of this action.
Can only be executed while less than five chakra are open.

pve_actions.name: The Forbidden Chakra
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 400.
Can only be executed while in combat and under the effect of five Chakra. Five chakra close upon execution.

pve_actions.name: Masterful Blitz
pve_actions.effect:
Strike the enemy with a technique fueled by the power of your Beast Chakra.
The technique used is determined by the number of different types of Beast Chakra opened.
1 Beast Chakra Type: Elixir Burst
2 Beast Chakra Types: Celestial Revolution
3 Beast Chakra Types: Rising Phoenix
3 Beast Chakra and Both Nadi: Phantom Rush

pve_actions.name: Tornado Kick
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 1,200 for the first enemy, and 35% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants Formless Fist, allowing the execution of a weaponskill that requires a certain form, without being in that form
Duration: 30s
Any additional effects associated with the executed action will also be applied.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Lunar Nadi and Solar Nadi, as well as three Beast Chakra.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Masterful Blitz changes to Tornado Kick when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Elixir Field
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to all nearby enemies with a potency of 800 for the first enemy, and 35% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Opens the Lunar Nadi
Additional Effect: Grants Formless Fist, allowing the execution of a weaponskill that requires a certain form, without being in that form
Duration: 30s
Any additional effects associated with the executed action will also be applied.
Can only be executed while under the effect of three of the same Beast Chakra.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Masterful Blitz changes to Elixir Field when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Celestial Revolution
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 600.
Additional Effect: Opens the Lunar Nadi
If the Lunar Nadi is already open, opens the Solar Nadi instead.
Additional Effect: Grants Formless Fist, allowing the execution of a weaponskill that requires a certain form, without being in that form
Duration: 30s
Any additional effects associated with the executed action will also be applied.
Can only be executed while under the effect of three Beast Chakra.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Masterful Blitz changes to Celestial Revolution when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Flint Strike
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to all nearby enemies with a potency of 800 for the first enemy, and 35% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Opens the Solar Nadi
Additional Effect: Grants Formless Fist, allowing the execution of a weaponskill that requires a certain form, without being in that form
Duration: 30s
Any additional effects associated with the executed action will also be applied.
Can only be executed while under the effect of three distinct Beast Chakra.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Masterful Blitz changes to Flint Strike when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Riddle of Earth
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by 20%.
Duration: 10s
Additional Effect: Grants Earth's Resolve upon taking damage
Earth's Resolve Effect: Gradually restores HP
Cure Potency: 100
Duration: 15s
Additional Effect: Grants Earth's Rumination
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Earth's Reply
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 300
Earth's Resolve Potency: 500
Can only be executed while under the effect of Earth's Rumination.

pve_actions.name: Riddle of Fire
pve_actions.effect:
Increases damage dealt by 15%.
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Grants Fire's Rumination
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: Brotherhood
pve_actions.effect:
Grants Brotherhood to self and all nearby party members.
Brotherhood Effect: Increases damage dealt by 5%
Additional Effect: Allows the opening of up to ten chakra
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Grants Meditative Brotherhood to self and all nearby party members
Meditative Brotherhood Effect: 20% chance you open a chakra when party members under this effect successfully land a weaponskill or cast a spell
Chance is 100% when you successfully land a weaponskill or cast a spell while under the effect of Meditative Brotherhood.
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: Riddle of Wind
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces auto-attack delay by 50%.
Duration: 15s
Additional Effect: Grants Wind's Rumination
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Enlightened Meditation
pve_actions.effect:
Opens a chakra. Up to five chakra can be opened at once.
Opens all five chakra when used outside of combat.
Triggers the cooldown of weaponskills upon execution.
Conversely, execution of weaponskills triggers the cooldown of this action.
Can only be executed while less than five chakra are open.

pve_actions.name: Enlightenment
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 160 to all enemies in a straight line before you.
Can only be executed while in combat and under the effect of five Chakra. Five chakra close upon execution.

pve_actions.name: Six-sided Star
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 780. Potency increases by 80 for each Chakra open.
Closes all chakra upon execution.
Additional Effect: Increases movement speed
Duration: 5s
Critical hits with this weaponskill will not open a chakra.
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

pve_actions.name: Shadow of the Destroyer
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 120 to all nearby enemies.
Opo-opo Form Bonus: Guarantees a critical hit
Damage dealt is increased when under an effect that raises critical hit rate.

Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Rising Phoenix
pve_actions.effect:
Deals physical fire damage to all nearby enemies with a potency of 900 for the first enemy, and 35% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Opens the Solar Nadi
Additional Effect: Grants Formless Fist, allowing the execution of a weaponskill that requires a certain form, without being in that form
Duration: 30s
Any additional effects associated with the executed action will also be applied.
Can only be executed while under the effect of three distinct Beast Chakra.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Masterful Blitz changes to Rising Phoenix when requirements for execution are met.

Any additional effects associated with the executed action will also be applied.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.

370 when executed from a target's flank.

Delivers an attack to all enemies in a straight line before you with a potency of 1,040 for the first enemy, and 35% less for all remaining enemies.

pve_actions.name: Second Wind
pve_actions.effect:
Instantly restores own HP.
Cure Potency: 800

pve_actions.name: Leg Sweep
pve_actions.effect:
Stuns target.
Duration: 3s

pve_actions.name: Bloodbath
pve_actions.effect:
Converts a portion of physical damage dealt into HP.
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: Feint
pve_actions.effect:
Lowers target's physical damage dealt by 10% and magic damage dealt by 5%.
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Arm's Length
pve_actions.effect:
Nullifies most knockback and draw-in effects.
Duration: 6s
Additional Effect: When you are struck by a physical attack, the striker will be afflicted with Slow +20%
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: True North
pve_actions.effect:
Nullifies all action direction requirements.
Duration: 10s
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Greased Lightning
traits.effect: Reduces weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay by 5%.

traits.name: Enhanced Greased Lightning
traits.effect: Reduces weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay by 10%.

traits.name: Deep Meditation
traits.effect: Grants an 80% chance that a chakra will open upon dealing critical damage with a weaponskill.

traits.name: Enhanced Greased Lightning II
traits.effect: Reduces weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay by 15%.

traits.name: Steel Peak Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Steel Peak to The Forbidden Chakra and Steeled Meditation to Forbidden Meditation.

traits.name: Enhanced Perfect Balance
traits.effect:
When under the effect of Perfect Balance, grants Beast Chakra in accordance with the form granted by the executed weaponskills.
Weaponskills granting opo-opo form will also grant Coeurl Chakra.
Weaponskills granting raptor form will also grant Opo-opo Chakra.
Weaponskills granting coeurl form will also grant Raptor Chakra.

traits.name: Deep Meditation II
traits.effect: Guarantees that a chakra will open upon dealing critical damage with a weaponskill.

traits.name: Howling Fist Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Inspirited Meditation to Enlightened Meditation and Howling Fist to Enlightenment.

traits.name: Enhanced Greased Lightning III
traits.effect: Reduces weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay by 20%.

traits.name: Arm of the Destroyer Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Arm of the Destroyer to Shadow of the Destroyer.

traits.name: Enhanced Thunderclap
traits.effect: Allows a third charge of Thunderclap.

traits.name: Melee Mastery
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Bootshine to 220, True Strike to 300, Snap Punch to 270, Twin Snakes to 380, Demolish to 320, Dragon Kick to 280, and The Forbidden Chakra to 400.

traits.name: Flint Strike Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Flint Strike to Rising Phoenix.

traits.name: Enhanced Brotherhood
traits.effect: Guarantees that a chakra will open when you are under the effect of Meditative Brotherhood and execute a weaponskill or cast a spell.

traits.name: Tornado Kick Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Tornado Kick to Phantom Rush.

traits.name: Beast Chakra Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Bootshine to Leaping Opo, True Strike to Rising Raptor, Snap Punch to Pouncing Coeurl, and Elixir Field to Elixir Burst.

traits.name: Melee Mastery II
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Twin Snakes to 420, Demolish to 360, Dragon Kick to 320, Six-sided Star to 780, and Phantom Rush to 1,500.

traits.name: Enhanced Riddle of Wind
traits.effect:
Grants Wind's Rumination upon executing Riddle of Wind.
Duration: 15s

traits.name: Enhanced Riddle of Fire
traits.effect:
Grants Fire's Rumination upon executing Riddle of Fire.
Duration: 20s

traits.name: Enhanced Second Wind
traits.effect: Increases the healing potency of Second Wind to 800.

traits.name: Enhanced Feint
traits.effect: Extends the duration of Feint to 15 seconds.
